hostname.description: Hostname to match for this Mapping. Use '*' to match all hostnames.

prefix.description: URL prefix to match for routing

prefix_regex.description: Whether the prefix should be interpreted as a regular expression

prefix_exact.description: Whether the prefix should be matched exactly rather than as a prefix

service.description: Target service to route to, in the format service-name.namespace:port or a full URL

rewrite.description: Prefix rewrite rule applied to the URL before forwarding to the backend service. Set to empty string to disable rewriting.

method_regex.description: Whether the method value is a regular expression

headers.description: HTTP headers that must be present on the request for this Mapping to match. Values can be exact strings or regular expressions.

query_parameters.description: Query parameters that must be present for this Mapping to match

host_regex.description: Deprecated. Whether host is a regular expression.

idle_timeout_ms.description: Idle timeout for streaming connections in milliseconds

cluster_idle_timeout_ms.description: Idle timeout for upstream connections in the cluster in milliseconds

weight.description: Weight for traffic splitting when multiple Mappings match the same prefix. Used in canary deployments.

bypass_auth.description: Whether to bypass the external authentication service for this Mapping

circuit_breakers.description: Circuit breaker configurations for the upstream cluster

labels.description: Rate limiting labels to apply to requests matching this Mapping. Labels are sent to the rate limiting service for evaluation.

add_request_headers.description: Headers to add to the request before forwarding to the upstream

add_response_headers.description: Headers to add to the response before sending to the client

remove_request_headers.description: Header names to remove from the request

remove_response_headers.description: Header names to remove from the response

allow_upgrade.description: Protocols to allow upgrade to, such as websocket

grpc.description: Whether the upstream service uses gRPC

enable_ipv4.description: Whether to enable IPv4 DNS lookups for the upstream service

enable_ipv6.description: Whether to enable IPv6 DNS lookups for the upstream service

ambassador_id.description: List of Ambassador IDs that should apply this Mapping. Used to partition a single Kubernetes cluster among multiple Ambassador instances.
